datasets.name: Warhammer 40,000 - 10th Edition
datasets.provenance: Community-derived dataset, compiled and quality-checked by the community and provided for personal use. Warhammer 40,000 and all unit/faction names, rules, and points values are the intellectual property of Games Workshop. This is an unofficial, fan-made compilation - not affiliated with, licensed by, or endorsed by Games Workshop.

datasets.name: Grimdark Future
datasets.provenance: Community-derived dataset built from OPR (onepagerules.com) Grimdark Future public Battlescribe data. One Page Rules retains all IP rights; use for personal/fan purposes only.

datasets.name: Warhammer 40,000 - 11th Edition - Missions
datasets.provenance: Community-derived dataset. Warhammer 40,000 primary and secondary mission rules, names, and scoring are the intellectual property of Games Workshop. This is an unofficial, fan-made compilation for personal use - not affiliated with, licensed by, or endorsed by Games Workshop.

datasets.name: Warhammer 40,000 - 11th Edition - Deployment Maps
datasets.provenance: Community-derived dataset. Deployment layouts transcribed from the Warhammer 40,000 Event Companion. All map layouts and imagery are the intellectual property of Games Workshop. This is an unofficial, fan-made compilation for personal use - not affiliated with, licensed by, or endorsed by Games Workshop.
